arts.ttl: Conte DEMANDS Garnacho: Napoli boss fumes and insists on Man Utd star
arts.sum: Conte DEMANDS Garnacho: Napoli boss fumes and insists on Man Utd star Of course, the former Chelsea boss is likely unhappy with the fact that Napoli have failed to secure him his top target, Alejandro Garnacho of Man Utd .

arts.ttl: Fulham Make Official Bid for Roma’s Zeki Celik
arts.sum: In the final hours of the January transfer window, Roma have received an official offer from Fulham for their right-back Zeki Celik. The Premier League side, managed by Marco Silva, have expressed strong interest in the Turkish defender as they look to bolster their defensive options. arts.ttl: Conte Addresses Napoli’s Transfer Strategy Ahead of Roma Clash
arts.sum: Napoli manager Antonio Conte has spoken candidly about the club's transfer activities and upcoming match against Roma in a pre-game press conference. The Italian tactician addressed several key issues, including the departure of Khvicha Kvaratskhelia and the team's overall transfer strategy. arts.ttl: Serie A | Roma v Napoli: Match Preview
arts.sum: The Stadio Olimpico is set to host a high-stakes encounter this Sunday evening as resurgent Roma welcome Serie A leaders Napoli in the latest installment of the Derby del Sole. This match promises to be a fascinating tactical battle between two of Italy's most storied clubs, both led by experienced and successful managers. arts.ttl: Napoli’s Last-Minute Push for Saint-Maximin as Garnacho Deal Falls Through
arts.sum: Napoli are making a final push to secure Allan Saint-Maximin on loan from Al-Ahli, as their pursuit of Manchester United's Alejandro Garnacho has ended unsuccessfully. The Italian club is working against the clock to finalize the deal for the French winger, who is currently on loan at Fenerbahçe.
